conservative.name: Fearsome Charge
conservative.requirements:
Used By: Gor, Wargor
Melee weapon, not engaged with target, target within close range

success.description: You lower your sharp horns and charge into battle, looking to impale the target. The target is struck for +1 damage

boon.description: The target must succeed at an Average (2d) Discipline (WP) check or gain the Rattled condition for 2 rounds

bane.description: The target may immediately take a free Basic Melee Attack against you

sigmarsComet.description: +1 critical and the target is knocked prone and must spend a manoeuvre to stand

reckless.name: Fearsome Charge
reckless.requirements:
Used By: Gor, Wargor
Melee weapon, not engaged with target, target within close range

success.description: The beastman lowers its sharp horns and charge into battle, looking to impale the target. The target is struck for +1 damage

boon.description: The target must succeed at an Average (2d) Discipline (WP) check or gain the Rattled condition for 2 rounds

bane.description: The target may immediately take a free Basic Melee Attack against you
